title: bridge-jmap: since_state parameter silently ignored
description: jmap/src/jmap.rs email_query() accepts since_state: Option<&str> but immediately does let _ = since_state. The bridge accumulates query_state across polls and passes it in, but it has no effect. The function always does a full Email/query scan. The dead parameter and the Arc<Mutex<Option<String>>> query_state in bridge.rs create a false impression that incremental polling is implemented. The query_state Arc should be removed from bridge.rs, and either the since_state parameter removed or the incremental Email/queryChanges path implemented.
